Class TableDesignSubwindow

java.lang.Object
ui.Subwindow
ui.TableDesignSubwindow
All Implemented Interfaces:
ColumnRepositoryObserver, ScrollableWindow
public class TableDesignSubwindow extends Subwindow implements ColumnRepositoryObserver, ScrollableWindow
A subwindow that provides an interface to edit the structure (columns) of a table.

Allows users to edit column names, types, default values, and constraints such as whether blanks are allowed. Also supports adding and deleting columns.

  • Constructor Details

    • TableDesignSubwindow

      public TableDesignSubwindow(int x, int y, int width, int height, String title, Table table)
      Constructs a TableDesignSubwindow with the given parameters.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-position of the window
      y - the y-position of the window
      width - the width of the window
      height - the height of the window
      title - the window title
      table - the table whose columns are to be edited
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if title or table is null

      public void onColumnChanged(Column changedColumn)
      Notifies the subwindow when a column has changed.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
